data.title: demo: Agents — hello world stateful AI agent
data.description:
## Goal

Educational hello-world demo for Cloudflare Agents (Durable Object-backed AI agent with state + scheduling).

## What to implement

* `HelloAgent` extending `Agent<Env>`
* `onRequest` handler that responds with current state
* `this.setState` to persist a visit counter
* A scheduled task via `this.schedule` that logs every minute
* `wrangler.jsonc` with DO binding and `new_sqlite_classes`

## Verify

```sh
curl https://<worker>.workers.dev/agents/hello-agent/instance-1
# Counter should increment on each request
```

## Repo

`skogai/cloudflare` — folder: `demos/agents-hello`

## Notes

Most relevant to Nelson/Polecat architecture — start here when thinking about multi-agent coordination patterns on Cloudflare.
